name: Morgan Patel
resume_text:
Morgan Patel
Email: morgan.patel.eval@example.com
Marketing Coordinator, Atlas CRM, 2022-2025
Built lifecycle email campaigns in HubSpot, coordinated monthly webinars with product marketing, maintained a campaign calendar, and reported registration-to-opportunity conversion in Sheets. Wrote subject line variants and worked with sales development on follow-up lists. Helped improve webinar attendance rate from 41 percent to 52 percent over two quarters.
Skills: HubSpot, email campaigns, webinar coordination, campaign reporting, copywriting.
expected_risks: Limited evidence of independent campaign strategy
human_notes: Good specialist candidate; interview should validate metric interpretation and copy decisions.
